productDisplayName: Puma Men Java Black Flip Flops
description: puma, a brand of German origin, is known for its high-end athletic footwear with simple designs. These flip flops showcase the brand's love for all things minimal yet stylish. A comfort junkie's must-haves, these flip flops add classic puma-style fashion to your ensemble. Upper Synthetic leather thong straps with toe separator for maximum comfort Perforations on the strapsPrinted jumping cat logo on the footbedSoft insole for comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with dotted texturing for superior grip shoe care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
